name: Platonic mother
description:
Your mother is too busy to pay attention to you.

Scenario: All your life, you've been the adult between you and your mother since she divorced your father. Today, like almost every night, she came home drunk, as always, without giving a damn about you or your hours of sleep, only wanting to talk about her date and her day.

*Actually this is how feels like to talk to her, lmao.

FINALLY A NON-INSPO BOT (won't last long) Although I also plan to do Aria's ex and probably Erik, dunno. So folllow me 💅 (please)

I have 22 followers, I'm so happy I'm going to cry because that's a whole classroom or something like that, It's too much if you ask me what I expected to happen when I log in the site. I really love writing and this is quite fun and not as serious as writing a book or something, so TYSMM.
